feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Pre-built WalkMe guided tours in 1H2025 release
entry.content: I see that SAP has now acquired WalkMe.  1H2025 release is providing some pre-built WalkMe guided tours in various places in SuccessFactors.  If an existing SAP customer wished to create their own bespoke WalkMe apps/guidance, how would that work and what type of license would be required

entry.title: Validation b/w Employee time start date and Job information effective date for a event reason
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am trying to built a logic to validate the year of Time Off request start date and year of effective date for a event reason in job information. 

If an employee is transferred to another country, post transfer event if employee initiates time off request, we are checking the feasibility to validate the year of Time Off request start date and year of effective date for a event reason in job information. So the long leave is requested in same year of the transfer. 

Looking for suggestion on the feasibility. 

Thanks & Regards

Arun

entry.title: Send emails by type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to know if it's possible the following:

If an employee has 2 types of email (Professional and Perssonal) registered on the system and he has an administrative position where does approvals in some workflow requests, is it possible to send the email notifications of workflows to their Professional email, but when he finalize for example their performance evaluation, receive this performance notification on your Personal email?

In other words, when the email notifications its about the Company x Employee relationship, the emails needs to be sent to your Personal email, but when the email notifications its about Management/Administrative process, the emails needs to be sent to your Professional email.

I thanfull your help.

 

Kind Regards

JC

entry.title: Update primary & secondary email for an user in SuccessFactors EC concurrently using OData API
entry.content:
Hi IDM Gurus,

For an user in SF moved from Onboarding module to EC, their personal email is carried forward and marked as primary email(for example "xxx@xxx.com" in PerEmail entity set as 'isPrimary=true'). Now when IDM generates business email(or example "yyy@yyy.com" ) and tries to set using OData API, I'm getting error "Only one email address can be set as primary"

I understand that, only one email can be set as primary and IDM is able to set business email as secondary. However in such case how do we set business email as primary and personal email as secondary in one request using OData?

I find SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/2749494/E to bundle both request in one OData payload but how do we bundle it in SAP IDM?

Here is IDM request -

entry.title: Pending Termination Workflow details to be sent to Identity management system.
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 With our current setup of Successfactors to Identity System,  the integration triggers only when the termination workflow is fully approved. Because of this some of the users may retain access for a few days post-termination.

So while brainstorming one of the ideas was to provide the pending termination workflow data to the identity team ( via API) including the effective date of termination record and they can take further action.

I tried using Mypendingworkflow API or wfRequest API which had its own set of issues where we cannot get effective date in the former and event reason not filterable in the latter.

So I am here seeking guidance for this use case in case anyone has encountered this issue.

entry.title: Business rule for Location as Accrual Recalculation field
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone help me with sample business rule for Accrual recalculation and the recalculation field is "Location", which we have added in Time account type.

When I tried to build a rule using "Get Job info string field value on Key date()", I could add it under Accrual rule variable.external code. This is returning numeric value(3 digit code ex: 649).

Please suggest how can we use this 3 digit code to recalculate accruals.

Thank you.

 

Regards,

Pavani

entry.title: SuccessFactors Practice systems unavailable?
entry.content:
Hi,

When navigating to my successfactors practice system (I had previously enrolled, and had been using it for the past 3 weeks), I'm presented with a message that says "System temporarily unavailable), on the main Practice System page for my learning journey.

Does that happen often? How long before the systems are back online? Any suggestions?

Thank you

entry.title: Delete a record during termination using business rule
entry.content:
Hello,

We currently have multiple bank records (in payment info portlet) for an employee (MAIN, Bonus)..During termination, we need to create a new record in the payment info with effective date as the termination date and only the Main bank gets created (Bonus bank info is deleted in the record).. Can we do such deletions through business rule?

entry.title: Enable Background Elements in SAP Onboarding 2.0 (Enhancement ID: 344613)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I’d like to bring attention to a significant enhancement request that impacts many SAP SuccessFactors customers across industries and geographies.

Current Limitation:

As of today, Background Elements such as:

  • Education
  • Work Experience
  • Certifications
  • Languages, etc.

are not supported in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0. This limitation means such critical data cannot be captured during the onboarding process and does not flow automatically into Employee Central post-hire.

Why This Matters:

This gap creates operational inefficiencies and potential compliance risks. Without Background Elements support in Onboarding:

  • HR teams must manually collect and re-enter data into EC
  • Employees often have to duplicate data entry post-hire
  • Incomplete profiles hinder downstream processes like Learning, Talent, and Analytics
  • Organizations face challenges in maintaining data integrity and audit readiness

Proposed Enhancement (ID: 344613):

The enhancement proposes that SAP:

1.Enable support for Background Elements in the Onboarding 2.0 process

2.Allow seamless integration of that data into Employee Central upon hire

This would ensure a complete and accurate employee profile from Day 1, streamline data flow, and reduce manual intervention.

Who Benefits:

  • HR Professionals: Reduce manual workload, ensure data consistency
  • New Hires: Smoother onboarding experience
  • Compliance Teams: Audit-ready certification and education records
  • Managers: Better decision-making with enriched employee data
  • All SAP Customers: More scalable and standardized onboarding-to-hire process

How You Can Help:

Please take a moment to support this enhancement request on the SAP Customer Influence Portal:

Vote here → https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/344613/?section=sectionDetails

Your vote and comments can make a difference in helping SAP prioritize this enhancement that can benefit the entire SuccessFactors ecosystem.

Let’s collaborate and help shape the future of SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding.

entry.title: How to automatically create a Job Information event at a termination?
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We have a custom date field "Garden Leave" in the Termination portlet. Our need is that when that field has a value, once the Termination is saved, to have an entry in Job Information automatically created at the effective date of the "Garden Leave" field.

We've tried to use an Integration Center triggered by the Termination even in Intelligent Services, but the IC doesn't let us select the Job Information portlet in the mapping.

We've also tried a cross-portlet rule, but without success.

Did someone had as similar need, and if yes, what solution did you find?

 

Regards,

William

entry.title: Differentiating TimeSheet Workflow-SuccessFactors TimeOff
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a scenario related to SuccessFactors Timeoff timesheet. As per the current scenario, timesheet is automatically submitted for approval to the manager (via workflow) if there are no changes in the weekly time data. This current scenario is working fine. 

Now, whenever an employee changes the back dated (retro) timesheet, a new 2 level workflow should be triggered. Any suggestions to configure this scenario.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Team Absence Calendar - Seeing Other Managers' Direct Reports
entry.content:
Hi all, I was wondering if any other SF customers had a solution to a scenario I'm looking at regarding Time Off, specifically providing an easy way to provide multiple managers with a view of team absence outside of their direct reporting line. For example, a call centre where there may be five managers each with ten direct reports. Manager A can see their own direct reports on the Team Absence Calendar, Manager B can see their own direct reports and so on. Ideally we'd like a way that Manager B can see the Manager A's direct reports' time off, and vice-versa. 

Currently I'm thinking we can look at RBP to allow the 'unofficial' manager to view the team's absence info, but I expect this would mean they would have to go onto individual people's profile to view their team, rather than providing a way off seeing it all together in one place like with the Team Absence Calendar. The other option is by providing regular reports. 

Has anyone come across anything similar and have any knowledge to share? Any advice welcome!

entry.title: Unable to change Microsoft Teams SF standard logo
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is there a way to edit or replace the default SuccessFactors logo in Microsoft Teams with our company logo? I'd appreciate any insights if anyone has tried or implemented this customization.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Permission Roles/Groups - Restrict access to entities to self
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm using the SAP SuccessFactors OData API to retrieve certain entities via a dedicated API user. However, I’m trying to figure out whether it’s possible to configure permission roles or groups in a way that lets me retrieve only the entities that are relevant to the end user (not the API user), based on specific business rules or dynamic criteria.

For example, take the Cost Center Foundation Object: I want to allow certain users to query cost centers, but only the ones where they are assigned as the cost center manager.

I know that in Business Rules, there is a way to check if a user is the currently logged-in user—like in this screenshot:

But I couldn't find any documentation or approach that allows something similar at the permission level. I'm not even sure if it's possible, but maybe someone has encountered a similar requirement and solved it with a different workaround (e.g. via MDF roles, custom filters, or proxy logic).

Any insight or experience would be greatly appreciated!

Best regards,

entry.title: Updated HRIS Mappings - but HRIS Sync job not updating the users data
entry.content:
Hi all,

Currently using an implementation test tenant, that has over 1200 default users provided by SAP.

I have added some HRIS mappings, so that Custom1, Custom2 should be updated with different data. (e.g. setting placing Standard Weekly Hours into Custom12. See below

However, when I run the HRIS Sync job, the data is not updating for all the users. I would have expected that Custom12 would now be updated with users Standard Hours.

The only way it did eventually sync the mappings was to make a change directly to the user. So I went and changed Standard Hours from 40 to 39. This had a knock on effect, and now for only that user - the custom fields have mapped correctly.

How do I get all users to have their Custom Fields updated?

Thanks,

Ed

entry.title: How to Auto-Populate Manager Name in Department Based on Custom Position Field in Successfactors?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a requirement in SAP SuccessFactors where I added two custom fields in the Department (FO_Department) object:

  1. cust_chiefPos – a custom field of type Position (Foundation Object), used to store the manager position of the department.

  2. cust_chiefName – intended to store the name of the user who holds that position.

The goal is:
Whenever a user selects a manager position (cust_chiefPos) in the department, I want the cust_chiefName field to be automatically filled with the name of the user (incumbent) who holds that position.

I encountered issues accessing userNav or the incumbent details in the rule editor.
Also, I'm unsure whether cust_chiefName should be a String, or if it's possible to use User type directly and still auto-populate it.

Any help or best practice is highly appreciated!
Thanks in advance 🙏

entry.title: Termination - Time account days over
entry.content:
Hello experts,

The payout profile feature in a termination allows you to create a spot bonus with a partial or total amount of days (recalculated with the termination rule). However, if you have used more vacation days than the recalculation calculates, the system doesn't create a deduction. 

For example:

I accrued 30 days on 01/01/2025, I use 15, and on 02/01/2025 they terminate me. The recalculation says that I owe X days to the company. I'm wondering if using the purchase payout profile I can create a deduction like payout profile can do it. I think that is not possible, and the easiest workaround is that the HR create a deduction of X days in the employee profile or use some kind of integration between ISC-IC. If someone knows a better option, I would be glad to hear it.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Performance Objectives - Story reporting
entry.content:
Dear all, 

The question involves elements of both RBP and Story reporting. A performance objective is an agreement between the employee and their manager. However, our Center of Excellence (CoE) wants to monitor whether each employee has set their objectives. Using RBP, we can access the objective form, but this opens the content of the objectives. In the story report, I exclude the descriptions and focus only on the high-level counts (Objectives ID/Status). 

Can we report only on the objective IDs and statuses, without exposing the full objective content? 

Thanks

Mirjam

entry.title: Error message when trying to create 2 new users
entry.content:
Hello experts,

This error message appears when we try to import 2 users at the same time: a manager is hired after his direct report:

entry.title: EDIT HIRE RECORD BY IMPORT
entry.content:
Hello experts,

please is there a way to edit new hires records by import?
